videos.title: USCSA Men’s Classic Race – Leadville, CO | Tough Conditions, Fast Racing
videos.channel: Colorado Mesa University Cross Country Skiing
videos.description:
This 9-minute video captures the atmosphere, course difficulty, and competitive depth of the field of the men’s classic race at Tennessee Pass Nordic Center in Leadville, offering a real feel for how the race unfolded and showcasing most of the athletes throughout the course. The race was organized by Colorado State University (CSU), whose team delivered a well-run and competitive event despite challenging winter conditions.

Due to difficult snow conditions, the race was shortened to a 3 km classic sprint-style course, but the difficulty was anything but short. Skiers faced a demanding layout featuring sustained climbs, technical transitions, and fast, unpredictable descents.

videos.title: BABs Part 1 Nordic Ski Weekend // Crosscountry Skiing Mt. Massive Nordic Center
videos.description:
BABs Lacey, Rachel, Natalia and Nancy did a crosscountry (and backcountry) ski weekend! We all met in Leadville, Lacey and Rachel starting from Colorado Springs and Nancy and Natalia starting from Denver. Lacey and Rachel nordic skied at Mt. Massive Nordic Center that morning while Nancy and Natalia backcountry skied. We all met up at the Tennessee Pass Yurts for our overnight stay and dinner at the Cookhouse! 

Watch in part 1 for a great tour of the Mt. Massive Nordic Center followed by the trek to Tennessee Pass and finding our yurt! If you haven't heard of dinner at the Tennessee Pass Cookhouse - it is an EXPERIENCE that you don’t want to miss. Thanks for watching and don’t forget to subscribe to part 2 to see dinner and skiing the entire Tennessee Pass nordic system!

videos.title: Skijoring in Three Rivers Parks with Kristine Zellmer

Bring your dog to Three Rivers Parks for fun winter exercise where we have designated trails for skijoring and dog sledding!
